title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BALASAN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO LEON GANZON MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 9280 / 62 OG No. 40, 7206 (October 3, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4450, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BALASAN HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO LEON GANZON MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Balasan High School in the Municipality of Balasan, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Leon Ganzon Memorial High School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
